summary: CI/CD pipeline requires no changes for Iteration 2. Existing GitHub Actions workflow (from Iteration 1) automatically handles dart analyze and flutter test on all branches.

workflow_file.notes: Copied from main branch. Triggers on push to iter-* branches and PRs to main. Jobs: analyze-and-test, build-apk (on version tag).

deploy_documentation.notes: Existing documentation from Iteration 1 remains current. No new env vars or secrets required for Iteration 2.

devops_handoff.notes: Iteration 2 DevOps handoff documenting no CI changes required.

required_artifacts_present.details: CI workflow present, DEPLOY.md verified, all secrets configured in GitHub Actions

ci_checks_passed_or_accepted.details: Flutter CI pipeline established in Iteration 1. dart analyze and flutter test jobs ready for Iteration 2 code. No APK build required unless version tag is created.

security_checks.details: 13 GitHub Actions secrets configured: Firebase (Android/iOS), FCM, Storage, OAuth clients, API base URL. Sensitive values never committed. Base64-encoded Firebase configs validated in Iteration 1.

next_devops_work.iteration_3a: Add Claude AI and SOAT-related env vars (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, SOAT_STORAGE_PATH, etc.) to GitHub Actions secrets and ci.yml if backend requires them.
next_devops_work.iteration_6a: Add FCM Android/iOS configuration and APNs keys to CI/CD pipeline for push notification builds.
